name: KALA BIO, Inc.
business: KALA BIO is developing a dedicated, on-premises artificial intelligence infrastructure platform (Researgency) for biotechnology and pharmaceutical companies, while also seeking to monetize its legacy mesenchymal stem cell secretome (MSC-S) biologics assets.

exposures.sentence: Researgency is designed for on-premises deployment within client environments, enabling customers to leverage advanced AI capabilities while maintaining complete control over their proprietary biological data and intellectual property.
Our AI platform services depend, in part, on access to graphics processing unit ("GPU") infrastructure and other specialized computational resources.

We are preserving our MSC-S platform intellectual property, including the KPI-012 and KPI-014 product candidates and related patents and know-how, and are evaluating strategic options with respect to those assets.
